notes: Runtime tuning file for the game engine. Each setting uses value as the active value.
default records the code-safe fallback. If a setting is missing or invalid, the engine uses its built-in default.
used_by lists the routines most directly affected by the setting.

max_history.note: Maximum player/DM exchanges retained in ConversationManager.history and restored from story_transcript.md.

summary_update_interval.note: Number of recent exchanges used by the legacy in-memory summary builder.

max_fact_count.note: Maximum concise known_facts retained per NPC after categorization and stale-fact replacement.

max_fact_chars.note: Maximum characters retained for one NPC known fact.

turn_memory_update_max_facts.note: Maximum NPC, scene, world, or contradiction facts accepted from one turn_summary memory_updates response.

max_facts_per_scope.note: Maximum keyed scene facts retained in each scene_facts scope. Local facts describe the immediate scene; carryover facts follow the player across scene changes.

default_unevaluated_dc.note: Diagnostic fallback DC used when skill/DC evaluation cannot determine a base DC. This value is intentionally not one of the reference example DCs.

social_mood_margin_multiplier.note: Multiplier applied to a social roll margin before updating the NPC identity.mood number. The per-roll mood delta is still capped to +/-10, and total mood is capped to +/-30.

mood_decay_per_hour.note: Amount each NPC identity.mood moves toward zero for every world-clock hour boundary crossed.

copper_per_silver.note: Number of copper coins equal to one silver coin for wallet conversion and display.

copper_per_gold.note: Number of copper coins equal to one gold coin. Legacy player.gold and quest reward gold are converted using this value.

copper_per_platinum.note: Number of copper coins equal to one platinum coin for wallet conversion and display.

call_delay_seconds.note: Delay before live API calls. API_CALL_DELAY_SECONDS environment variable still overrides this.

live_timeout_seconds.note: HTTP timeout for structured APIManager chat-completion calls.

dm_timeout_seconds.note: HTTP timeout for the direct DM narration call.

max_cache_size.note: Maximum structured API responses cached during one session.

call_history_limit.note: Maximum API call metric entries retained in memory.

context_max_tokens.note: Nominal token budget for APIManager context optimization.

optimized_interaction_history_limit.note: Maximum interaction_history items retained during APIManager context optimization.

default_max_tokens.note: Default max_tokens for structured model calls when a routine does not pass a more specific value.

dm_max_tokens.note: Maximum response tokens for final DM narration.

turn_context_max_tokens.note: Maximum response tokens for turn context evaluation.

dc_evaluation_max_tokens.note: Maximum response tokens for DC fact-modifier evaluation.

narrative_brief_temperature.note: Temperature for compact narrative brief generation.

narrative_brief_max_tokens.note: Maximum response tokens for compact narrative brief generation.

npc_review_max_tokens.note: Maximum response tokens for NPC action review.

turn_summary_temperature.note: Temperature for one-line turn summary generation.

turn_summary_max_tokens.note: Maximum response tokens for turn summary generation plus optional durable memory_updates extraction.

ooc_question_temperature.note: Temperature for out-of-character DM/referee question answers.

ooc_question_max_tokens.note: Maximum response tokens for out-of-character DM/referee question answers.

min_paragraphs.note: Minimum narrative paragraphs before the final JSON command block.

max_paragraphs.note: Maximum narrative paragraphs before the final JSON command block.

response_hook_count.note: Number of clear player response opportunities the DM narration should present before stopping.

prose_heat.note: Controls DM prose intensity on a 0-5 scale: 0 plain/referee, 1 grounded, 2 restrained novel prose, 3 atmospheric, 4 lyrical, 5 ornate.

default_turn_minutes.note: Minutes automatically advanced after a completed player turn when the DM did not emit a time_update command and no explicit player-declared duration was inferred.

max_dm_advance_minutes.note: Maximum minutes the DM may advance with one time_update command.

compact_text_chars.note: Default character cap for compacting free text before prompt use.

compact_list_items.note: Default number of list items retained when compacting lists for prompts.

compact_list_chars.note: Default character cap for each compacted list item.

recent_exchange_limit.note: Default number of recent exchanges exposed to non-DM prompt packets.

recent_player_chars.note: Default character cap for each recent player input in prompt history.

recent_dm_chars.note: Default character cap for each recent DM response in prompt history.

opening_scene_chars.note: Character cap for opening scene context supplied to prompts.

story_bible_excerpt_chars.note: Default character cap for relevant Story_bible excerpt in prompt packets.

runtime_story_bible_excerpt_chars.note: Smaller Story_bible excerpt cap for detection/review prompts that already have turn context.

scene_context_chars.note: Character cap for current scene context in prompt packets.

scene_brief_chars.note: Character cap for narrative scene briefs.

brief_token_budget.note: Approximate token budget for sanitized narrative briefs.

dm_recent_exchange_limit.note: Number of recent exchanges included directly in the final DM prompt.

dm_recent_player_chars.note: Character cap for recent player inputs in the final DM prompt.

dm_recent_dm_chars.note: Character cap for recent DM responses in the final DM prompt.

dm_summary_chars.note: Character cap for campaign summary in the final DM prompt.

transcript_retrieval_max_snippets.note: Maximum locally retrieved story_transcript snippets included as continuity evidence for a turn.

transcript_retrieval_max_chars.note: Character cap for each locally retrieved transcript evidence excerpt.

transcript_retrieval_max_turns.note: Maximum prior story_transcript turns searched by the local continuity retrieval step.

transcript_retrieval_term_limit.note: Maximum extracted player-input terms used by local transcript retrieval.

engine_startup_wait_seconds.note: Seconds GameEngine waits after launching the web interface thread.

browser_open_delay_seconds.note: Seconds WebInterface waits before opening the browser.

shutdown_request_timeout_seconds.note: Timeout for the graceful /shutdown HTTP request.

shutdown_join_timeout_seconds.note: Thread join timeout during web server shutdown.

grid_scale_meters.note: Meters represented by each combat-map cell.

default_width.note: Default combat-map width in grid cells.

default_height.note: Default combat-map height in grid cells.
